name: Hernandez Jewelers & Pawn
description_short: Pawn shop in Phoenix offering collateral-based loans and jewelry/gold buying. 4.4-star rated with 82 reviews.
description_long: Hernandez Jewelers & Pawn is a pawn shop located in Phoenix, Arizona, serving the local community from its South Central Avenue location. The business operates as a traditional pawn operation, combining jewelry retail with collateral-based lending services. With a 4.4-star rating across 82 Google reviews, the shop has established a presence in the Phoenix market with consistent customer feedback. The business model reflects the dual-revenue pawn shop structure: accepting items as collateral for short-term loans while also buying and selling jewelry and other goods. Hernandez Jewelers & Pawn specifically emphasizes jewelry and gold, suggesting specialization in precious metal transactions alongside general pawn services. The company maintains regular business hours Monday through Wednesday from 9AM-6PM, with phone accessibility at 602-276-6933 for customer inquiries. As a pawn shop, the business serves individuals seeking quick cash access without credit checks or lengthy approval processes. The 4.4-star rating suggests above-average customer satisfaction relative to the pawn industry, though the limited dataset of reviews should be considered when evaluating consistency. The business does not appear to offer alternative financial products like personal loans, debt relief, or credit building services—it operates strictly within the pawn and jewelry retail space. Customers should note that pawn transactions are inherently short-term and carry redemption deadlines; failure to redeem within the specified period results in forfeiture of the pledged item. The specific services and loan terms are not detailed on the listing, requiring direct contact for current rates, item acceptance policies, and redemption timelines.
pros: 4.4-star Google rating based on 82 customer reviews indicates above-average satisfaction
No credit check required for pawn loans—accessible to consumers with poor or no credit
Specializes in jewelry and gold, suggesting expertise in precious metal valuation
Convenient South Central Phoenix location with regular operating hours
Fast cash access through collateral-based lending without lengthy approval
Established business with documented customer feedback and community presence
cons: Limited business hours (9AM-6PM Mon-Wed; hours incomplete for other weekdays) may not accommodate all customers
No information available about current interest rates, loan terms, or redemption periods
Website listing lacks details on accepted items, maximum loan amounts, or fees
Pawn loans are short-term by nature; forfeiture risk if unable to redeem within deadline
No online application or rate quotes available; requires in-person or phone contact
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash who prefer not to undergo credit evaluation
Individuals with jewelry or gold to liquidate quickly for cash
People seeking short-term collateral-based loans without bank requirements
diagnosis: Hernandez Jewelers & Pawn is best for consumers who own jewelry or gold and need fast cash without credit evaluation, or those seeking short-term collateral loans. The primary caveat is that pawn loans carry strict redemption deadlines and forfeiture risk; customers must be prepared to repay within the specified timeframe or lose their pledged items permanently.
services: Gold buying and precious metal transactions
